name: County Income by Population Change
description: Median household income and population gain/loss for 3,137 US counties (IMS Ch. 3)
studyDescription: Data from 3,137 US counties (2019 American Community Survey). Each county's median household income is paired with whether the county gained or lost population between the 2010 and 2019 censuses. Five counties with missing data were excluded.

variableDescriptions.median_hh_income: Median household income in US dollars for the county (2019 ACS estimate).
variableDescriptions.pop_gain: Whether the county's population increased ('Gain') or did not increase ('No Gain') between 2010 and 2019.

sourceDetail: usdata::county from the usdata R package. Derived from US Census American Community Survey (2019). Public domain data.
